name: Rx.Op.Sample

subprograms.name: Create
subprograms.code:
function Create (Policy  : Policies;
                 Sampler : Samplers.Observable'Class) return Operate.Operator'Class

formals.name: Operate
formals.code: with package Operate is new Rx.Impl.Preservers (<>);

formals.name: Samplers
formals.code: with package Samplers is new Rx.Impl.Typed (<>);
